Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.
Video.title: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Image.alt: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?
Did You Hurt Our Daughter?
Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Video.summary: Steve revisits relationships that were riddled with all kinds of problems.
Video.title: Young Relationships Tested

Image.alt: Young Relationships Tested
Young Relationships Tested
Young Relationships Tested

Video.summary: Ijwaun and Terrika are back for another DNA test; Molly and Kendall seek DNA results.
Video.title: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Image.alt: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Video.summary: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 children together, but she is cracking from the physical abuse. Andrew says he’s worried she’s been cheating on him and doesn’t know if the children are his! Can Steve’s test results save their relationship?
Video.title: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Image.alt: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Video.summary: Kimberly’s son was born with a rare disease and she suspected the child’s father of stealing money for his medical treatment. Then, Avonte was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer and never saw a dime from his aunt Terceira’s fundraiser for him!
Video.title: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Image.alt: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Video.summary: James learned that his new wife may have been cheating with his cousin; Marissa left her doubting boyfriend two days after her baby was born, and now he wants the truth; Lyric wants to prove to Jeff's family that her baby is his.
Video.title: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Image.alt: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Video.summary: 14 year old Rusty called our show because he says that he can no longer deal with his parent's constant fighting. He says that in the past they've hit each other, thrown appliances at each other and even bit him. His mother Mildred says that she and her husband Russell always fight and abuse each other because she suspects Russell of cheating.
Video.title: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Image.alt: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Before Tonesha marries Theotis, she wants to know if he has cheated on her; Danielle suspects her partner, Shaun, is cheating and lying about being at work; less than a day after their wedding, Shante discovered that David sent naked photos to women.
Video.title: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Image.alt: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Video.summary: Cassey believes she recently uncovered her ex-husband Calvin’s evil deeds, which he was trying to cover up with gifts for his daughter, but did he actually molest her daughter? Or has she had it all wrong?
Video.title: I Want Justice for My Daughter

Image.alt: I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter

Video.summary: Toni wants to prove she was not present at the time her boyfriend recorded her 1-year-old daughter playing with a firearm; Jada wants to know if it was her brother's girlfriend who called child protective services on her and why.
Video.title: Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun

Image.alt: Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun
Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun
Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun

Video.summary: Ryan denies that the condom his wife found in her car was his; Byronica, a young mother of five, says she will divorce her husband if he fails his lie-detector test.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough!

Image.alt: Steve's Had Enough!
Steve's Had Enough!
Steve's Had Enough!

Video.summary: James uncovered a series of disturbing lies Shaneema told, and he now wonders if he is really her son's father; Lee wonders if his wife is still cheating on him.
Video.title: A Huge Lie Destroyed Us

Image.alt: A Huge Lie Destroyed Us
A Huge Lie Destroyed Us
A Huge Lie Destroyed Us

Video.summary: Alec called the show to say that his girlfriend Tori is being physically and mentally abusive. He says he needs Steve to help him give her a wakeup call and start showing him the respect that he deserves.
Video.title: My Girlfriend Beats Me

Image.alt: My Girlfriend Beats Me
My Girlfriend Beats Me
My Girlfriend Beats Me

Video.summary: Brandie is a 16 year old sex addict who claims to have slept with over 200 men. Steve enlists the help of Marvelyn, a woman who contracted HIV at the age of 19. Then, Shantaysia is 19 years old and works as a prostitute.
Video.title: Teen Sex and Prostitution

Image.alt: Teen Sex and Prostitution
Teen Sex and Prostitution
Teen Sex and Prostitution

Video.summary: Lainie and Justin have 9 month old baby together. Justin abuses Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. She’s come here to pass a lie-detector test to prove her fidelity. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
Video.title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

Image.alt: You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Image.alt: A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Julian recently confessed to cheating with Joanna, Linda’s sister-in-law, who he says actually seduced him.
Video.title: Tell the Truth Now

Image.alt: Tell the Truth Now
Tell the Truth Now
Tell the Truth Now

Video.summary: Donnie's wife disappeared with his cousin for hours and refused to take his phone calls; another parent told Angelina that her boyfriend was cheating with a prostitute.
Video.title: Your Story Is Shady

Image.alt: Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady

Video.summary: Nathan currently has 4 children with 2 different women and is in a serious mountain of trouble. Jamie, his first baby's mother, is tired of his lasting neglect for their 3 kids and needs him to step up to the role.
Video.title: You Call Yourself A Father?

Image.alt: You Call Yourself A Father?
You Call Yourself A Father?
You Call Yourself A Father?

Video.summary: While out looking for work, Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was taken to the hospital where she died. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!
Video.title: A Tragic Accident

Image.alt: A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident

Video.summary: Shanetta's boyfriend says she has been acting strangely, and he fears that their son may not be his; Tabitha's partner wants to know if the men with whom he caught her are really her family members.
Video.title: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Image.alt: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Video.summary: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.
Video.title: I Saw You Through The Window

Image.alt: I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window

Video.summary: Kerenina and Clay have a four-month-old son, but Clay cannot deny his suspicions that the child might actually have been fathered by their 71 year old roommate, William.
Video.title: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Image.alt: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Video.summary: Sabrionna has been waiting to return for a DNA and lie detector test to prove that Anthony’s the father and she has been faithful to him! Then, Patrick returns to prove that he’s not the father of Angel’s baby while her man Dale fumes!
Video.title: She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?

Image.alt: She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?
She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?
She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?

Video.summary: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.
Video.title: I Hope I'm Not The Father

Image.alt: I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father

Video.summary: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.
Video.title: The Lighter Side of Steve

Image.alt: The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Video.summary: Denise found out that Jamaul had another woman staying with him while she was out of town; Donna's husband claims that she has been unfaithful; Jason and Tammy's rocky relationship; lie detector tests for cheating accusations.
Video.title: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Image.alt: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her abusive boyfriend Michael of 11 months. Michael says Betty abuses him, too, but Scott and Dawn don’t believe him. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
Video.title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Image.alt: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
